title: Adopting green choices and behaviours
body: "This note summarises an expert roundtable held in January 2025, discussing how best do we encourage and enable individuals to adopt green choices and behaviours that will reduce emissions.  Rapid projects support government departments to understand the scientific evidence underpinning a policy issue or area by convening academic, industry and government experts at a single roundtable. These summary meeting notes seek to provide accessible science advice for policymakers. They represent the combined views of roundtable participants at the time of the discussion and are not statements of government policy. "
